빌립보서 4:1.content: Therefore, my brothers, beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord in this way, my beloved.

빌립보서 4:2.content: I exhort Euodia, and I exhort Syntyche, to think the same way in the Lord.

빌립보서 4:3.content: Yes, I beg you also, true partner, help these women, for they labored with me in the Good News with Clement also, and the rest of my fellow workers, whose names are in the book of life.

빌립보서 4:4.content: Rejoice in the Lord always! Again I will say, “Rejoice!”

빌립보서 4:5.content: Let your gentleness be known to all men. The Lord is at hand.

빌립보서 4:6.content: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.

빌립보서 4:7.content: And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.

빌립보서 4:8.content: Finally, brothers, whatever things are true, whatever things are honorable, whatever things are just, whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely, whatever things are of good report: if there is any virtue and if there is any praise, think about these things.

빌립보서 4:9.content: The things which you learned, received, heard, and saw in me: do these things, and the God of peace will be with you.

빌립보서 4:10.content: But I rejoice in the Lord greatly, that now at length you have revived your thought for me; in which you did indeed take thought, but you lacked opportunity.

빌립보서 4:11.content: Not that I speak because of lack, for I have learned in whatever state I am, to be content in it.

빌립보서 4:12.content: I know how to be humbled, and I also know how to abound. In everything and in all things I have learned the secret both to be filled and to be hungry, both to abound and to be in need.

빌립보서 4:13.content: I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.

빌립보서 4:14.content: However you did well that you shared in my affliction.

빌립보서 4:15.content: You yourselves also know, you Philippians, that in the beginning of the Good News, when I departed from Macedonia, no assembly shared with me in the matter of giving and receiving but you only.

빌립보서 4:16.content: For even in Thessalonica you sent once and again to my need.

빌립보서 4:17.content: Not that I seek for the gift, but I seek for the fruit that increases to your account.

빌립보서 4:18.content: But I have all things and abound. I am filled, having received from Epaphroditus the things that came from you, a sweet-smelling fragrance, an acceptable and well-pleasing sacrifice to God.

빌립보서 4:19.content: My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.

빌립보서 4:20.content: Now to our God and Father be the glory forever and ever! Amen.

빌립보서 4:21.content: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus. The brothers who are with me greet you.

빌립보서 4:22.content: All the saints greet you, especially those who are of Caesar’s household.

빌립보서 4:23.content: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
